---
name: Planned task
about: Scope implementation work that needs planning or decomposition
title: ""
labels: "status:ready,size:planned"
assignees: ""
---

## Goal

Describe the concrete outcome this task should produce.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] The expected behavior is implemented
- [ ] Relevant tests are added or updated
- [ ] Relevant docs are updated
- [ ] Verification commands pass or failures are documented

## Implementation Notes

Summarize the intended approach, important constraints, and affected areas.

## Task Split

Use this checklist for child issues when the task is large enough to split.

- [ ] Link child issue here

## Out of Scope

List related work that should not be included in this issue.

## Labels

Suggested labels:
- `status:ready`
- `size:planned` or `size:epic`
- One type label: `bug`, `enhancement`, `documentation`, `refactor`, or `maintenance`
- Optional `area:*`
